case_title: ALICEA CARMEN VS RODRIGUEZ JEAN PAUL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ JEAN PAUL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $360.00 FILED BY ALICEA CARMEN AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ JEAN PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
